articles.title: Here’s what meteorologists are saying about heavy rain, damaging winds on Monday
articles.description:
"Widespread showers and embedded t-storms through tonight will bring heavy rainfall and possible flooding."

The post Here’s what meteorologists are saying about heavy rain, damaging winds on Monday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meteorologists predict heavy rain and thunderstorms for Boston on Monday evening.
Rainfall may exceed 2 inches, increasing flood risks in low-lying areas.
Damaging winds could reach up to 40 mph, posing hazards to residents.

articles.title: Firefighter suffers cardiac arrest during Hyde Park blaze
articles.description:
A medical emergency was reported as crews battled a fire that spread across a warehouse roof, authorities say.

The post Firefighter suffers cardiac arrest during Hyde Park blaze appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Firefighter suffered cardiac arrest while battling a warehouse fire in Hyde Park.
The blaze spread across the roof, prompting a significant emergency response.
Local residents may experience increased fire safety measures following this incident.

articles.title: Mass. native’s 44-point performance helped Penn reach NCAA Tournament in dramatic fashion
articles.description:
T.J. Power, a former Massachusetts Gatorade Player of the Year, scored 44 points as Penn upset Yale.

The post Mass. native’s 44-point performance helped Penn reach NCAA Tournament in dramatic fashion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: T.J. Power scored 44 points, leading Penn to upset Yale in the Ivy League tournament.
Power, a Massachusetts native, was the Gatorade Player of the Year before joining Penn.
This victory secures Penn's spot in the NCAA Tournament, boosting local pride in Massachusetts athletes.
